--- title: "Geuvadis noisy splicing QTL" categories: - QTL - Geuvadis - "noisy splicing" date: 2022-10-23 author: "Chao Dai" --- ### Samples used 274 Geuvaids samples are used (see [details](Geuvadis-Samples.pub.qmd)) in this test run. These are samples that have single run (single ERR ID) that have matching genotype in 1000 genome project.
Ankeeta's dataset has total 452 runs, representing lesst han 452 samples. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} metadata = fread("../code/resources/geuvadis-sample-run-pop-lookup.tsv") ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} perm_out_cols = c("pid", "pchr", "pstart", "pend", "pstrand", "num_snp_tested", "best_nominal_dist", "best_gid", "best_gchr", "best_gstart", "best_gend", "true_dof", "esti_dof", "beta_ml1", "beta_ml2", "pval_nom", "pval_r2", "regression_slop", "pval_emp", "pval_adj", "qval") qtls = dir("../code/results/qtltools/Geuvadis/cis_100000/perm/", ".+addQval.txt.gz", full.names = T) qtls = naturalsort::naturalsort(qtls) names(qtls) = str_extract(qtls, "chr[0-9]{1,2}") qtls = map(qtls, ~fread(.x, col.names = perm_out_cols)) ``` ::: qvalue summaries ::: {.panel-tabset} #### chr1 - chr5 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} map(qtls[1:5], ~ summary(.x$qval)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` $chr1 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9994 0.9994 0.9709 0.9994 0.9994 $chr2 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9993 0.9993 0.9169 0.9993 0.9993 $chr3 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9974 0.9974 0.9362 0.9974 0.9995 $chr4 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9995 0.9995 0.9756 0.9995 0.9995 $chr5 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9997 0.9997 0.9560 0.9997 0.9997 ``` ::: ::: #### chr6 - chr10 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} map(qtls[6:10], ~ summary(.x$qval)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` $chr6 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9928 0.9985 0.8854 0.9985 0.9998 $chr7 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9993 0.9993 0.9213 0.9993 0.9999 $chr8 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9953 0.9953 0.9514 0.9953 0.9988 $chr9 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9999 0.9999 0.9583 0.9999 0.9999 $chr10 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9991 0.9991 0.9729 0.9991 0.9996 ``` ::: ::: #### chr11 - chr15 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} map(qtls[11:15], ~ summary(.x$qval)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` $chr11 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9978 0.9978 0.9490 0.9978 0.9999 $chr12 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9975 0.9975 0.9583 0.9975 0.9994 $chr13 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0003942 0.9944400 0.9944400 0.9782456 0.9944400 0.9999700 $chr14 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0001227 0.9992600 0.9992600 0.9959244 0.9992600 0.9992600 $chr15 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.02255 0.99985 0.99985 0.99665 0.99985 0.99985 ``` ::: ::: #### chr16 - chr22 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} map(qtls[16:22], ~ summary(.x$qval)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` $chr16 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9976 0.9976 0.9257 0.9976 0.9999 $chr17 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9985 0.9985 0.9802 0.9985 0.9989 $chr18 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9983 0.9983 0.9661 0.9983 0.9999 $chr19 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 0.9994 0.9994 0.9399 0.9994 0.9997 $chr20 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.0000 1.0000 1.0000 0.9642 1.0000 1.0000 $chr21 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.01181 0.99675 0.99675 0.98502 0.99675 0.99675 $chr22 Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. 0.6624 0.9996 0.9996 0.9990 0.9996 0.9996 ``` ::: ::: ::: ### qqplots - qtltools adjusted p-values These p-values are adjusted for number of variants, but not adjusted for phenotypes. :::{.panel-tabset} #### chr1 - chr5 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} leafcutter::multiqq( list(chr1 = qtls$chr1$pval_emp, chr2 = qtls$chr2$pval_emp, chr3 = qtls$chr3$pval_emp, chr4 = qtls$chr4$pval_emp, chr5 = qtls$chr5$pval_emp ) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](geuvadis_qtl_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### chr6 - chr10 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} leafcutter::multiqq( list(chr6 = qtls$chr6$pval_emp, chr7 = qtls$chr7$pval_emp, chr8 = qtls$chr8$pval_emp, chr9 = qtls$chr9$pval_emp, chr10 = qtls$chr10$pval_emp ) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](geuvadis_qtl_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### chr11 - chr15 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} leafcutter::multiqq( list(chr11 = qtls$chr11$pval_emp, chr12 = qtls$chr12$pval_emp, chr13 = qtls$chr13$pval_emp, chr14 = qtls$chr14$pval_emp, chr15 = qtls$chr15$pval_emp ) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](geuvadis_qtl_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-10-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### chr16 - chr20 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} leafcutter::multiqq( list(chr16 = qtls$chr16$pval_emp, chr17 = qtls$chr17$pval_emp, chr18 = qtls$chr18$pval_emp, chr19 = qtls$chr19$pval_emp, chr20 = qtls$chr20$pval_emp ) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](geuvadis_qtl_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### chr16 - chr20 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} leafcutter::multiqq( list( chr21 = qtls$chr21$pval_emp, chr22 = qtls$chr22$pval_emp ) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](geuvadis_qtl_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: ### How many qtls passing qval < 0.1? ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} puta_qtls = map(qtls, ~ .x[qval < .1]) %>% rbindlist ``` ::: Total number of qtls: 845 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} chroms = forcats::as_factor(paste("chr", 1:22, sep="")) puta_qtls[, .(n_qtls = length(unique(pid))), by = pchr] %>% .[, .(qtls = n_qtls, chr = factor(pchr, chroms))] %>% ggplot() + geom_col(aes(chr, qtls)) + labs(x = NULL) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](geuvadis_qtl_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-14-1.png){width=672} ::: :::
